objective: Resolve a QQ音乐 result-list OCR anchor inside the visible result region, click it, and capture post-click evidence.

anchor_offset_y.note: Positive Y biases the click below the text center, which may later help target a whole row instead of the exact glyph center.

preconditions: QQ音乐 is already showing a visible result list for the current search context.
Screen Recording and Accessibility permissions are already granted.
The recipe runs on the live desktop and still uses pointer disturbance.

notes: The default region ratios intentionally skip QQ音乐's left navigation and top hero area.
The current profile is tuned for the visible result-list band on a standard desktop layout.
Future apps such as 网易云 can reuse the same profile shape with different region defaults.
The skill explicitly re-activates QQ音乐 before OCR so the captured desktop actually contains the target app.
This skill assumes the result page is already visible.
Selection still depends on OCR plus pointer fallback.
This skill does not prove playback activation.

steps.purpose: Bring QQ音乐 to the foreground before screen-based OCR and pointer selection.
Re-establish the search input focus before checking the result list.
Wait until the anchor becomes visible in the constrained result region before the one-shot OCR resolve step.
Resolve a visible result-list OCR anchor inside the constrained result region.
Project the filtered OCR anchor back to logical coordinates and click it.
Capture post-click evidence after result selection.

expected_signals: debug.findScreenText reports at least one filtered match for ${anchor_text} inside the constrained result region.
debug.clickScreenText emits a logicalPoint note and completes the click.
The post-click screenshot shows the target row selected or highlighted.
success_criteria: A result-list anchor is resolved inside the constrained OCR region.
non_goals: This skill does not prove playback activation.
This skill does not prove Chinese OCR anchor stability yet.

known_limits.requires_visible_results: This skill assumes the result page is already open and visible.
known_limits.foreground_required: The skill now explicitly activates QQ音乐 before OCR to avoid capturing an unrelated frontmost app.
known_limits.region_tuning: The default OCR region ratios may need adjustment if the QQ音乐 layout changes or the window size is unusual.
known_limits.shared_app_state: Do not run this skill concurrently with other QQ音乐 recipes against the same live app instance.
